title: NIA Court Sends 7 Foreign Nationals, Including US Citizen and Ukrainians, To 30-Day Judicial Custody in UAPA Terror Case
description: While granting 11 days' remand, the court earlier had said, "So, it is not the situation that the FIR does not make a whisper about illegal acts being done by accused persons against national security and interests of India. In other words, Section 18 of UA(P)A broadly applies.
